name: Margherita
description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and fragrant basil leaves on a hand-tossed crust.
imageAlt: Margherita pizza with golden cheese and fresh basil

name: Pepperoni
description: Loaded with generous slices of spicy pepperoni over rich tomato sauce and melted mozzarella on a crispy crust.
imageAlt: Pepperoni pizza with crispy pepperoni slices and melted cheese

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Tandoor-marinated paneer cubes, bell peppers, and onions on a spiced tomato base with a blend of Indian spices.
imageAlt: Paneer Tikka pizza with colourful bell peppers and paneer cubes

name: BBQ Chicken
description: Smoky BBQ sauce topped with grilled chicken strips, caramelised onions, and a three-cheese blend for a hearty bite.
imageAlt: BBQ Chicken pizza with grilled chicken and smoky BBQ glaze

name: Farmhouse
description: A garden-fresh medley of mushrooms, capsicum, tomatoes, and black olives on a herbed tomato sauce with mozzarella.
imageAlt: Farmhouse pizza loaded with fresh vegetables and mozzarella

name: Mushroom Delight
description: Triple mushroom blend — button, portobello, and shiitake — with garlic cream sauce, thyme, and aged parmesan.
imageAlt: Mushroom Delight pizza with assorted mushrooms and cream sauce

name: Spicy Sausage
description: Fiery Italian sausage crumbles, jalapeños, red chilli flakes, and roasted red peppers on a zesty tomato base.
imageAlt: Spicy Sausage pizza with sausage crumbles and jalapeños

name: Four Cheese
description: An indulgent blend of mozzarella, cheddar, gouda, and gorgonzola on a white garlic sauce with a drizzle of honey.
imageAlt: Four Cheese pizza with a golden four-cheese blend and honey drizzle
